flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Saint Martin's University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (79.5% → 64.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Saint Martin's University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (60.9% → 51.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Saint Martin's University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saint Martin's University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.7k → $45.5k).
